description_long: This is a white ceramic cup with a cylindrical body and a rounded handle attached to one side. The exterior features a printed design that includes a red electrocardiogram (ECG) line forming a heart shape, accompanied by the phrase 'YOU ARE THE BEAT TO MY HEART' in bold black letters. One side of the cup displays a vertical list of dates in black text, separated by a red line from the ECG motif. The cup's rim and base are outlined with thin black lines, adding a subtle accent to its otherwise smooth, glossy surface. The interior is plain white, and the handle is ergonomically shaped for easy gripping.
description: A white ceramic cup with a red ECG heart motif, black text, and a list of dates, featuring a smooth, glossy finish and a rounded handle.
description_view_0: This view shows the cup's side with the vertical list of dates in black text, separated by a red ECG line.
description_view_1: This view centers on the handle, with the list of dates partially visible on the left and the start of the main text on the right.
description_view_2: This view highlights the main text 'YOU ARE THE BEAT TO MY HEART' and part of the ECG line.
description_view_3: This view displays the red ECG line forming a heart shape, with no text or handle visible.
